    Five steps to glass skin, made with ingredients you can trust.
    Authenticity
    Rooted in everyday beauty rituals

    Thoughtfully curated formulas that celebrate gentle care, layered hydration, and natural-looking radiance.

    Clean textures, effective ingredients

    Lightweight serums, creams, and treatments designed to feel comfortable while supporting a healthy-looking glow.

    Build your glow step by step

    From cleanse to finish, each product is made to fit naturally into a simple, skin-first routine.
    Customer-side trust
    Beauty that feels easy to choose

    Clear product categories, ingredient-led collections, and curated edits help customers shop with confidence.

    Real Routines, Real Results

    Honest words from customers who discovered new favorites, built better routines, and found products their skin truly enjoys.

    The Overnight Recovery Sleeping Mask is unreal. I put it on as my last step and by morning my skin is soft, bouncy, and so hydrated. My boyfriend actually asked if I changed my routine. Yes, I did — and I'm not going back.
    Sophia K.

    The Hyaluronic Glass Toner is genuinely the missing layer in my routine — I wake up plump and glowy now. Worth every penny.
    Jasmine L.

    Daily Sun Veil feels like nothing on my skin — no white cast, no greasy finish, just a soft glow. I layer it over my serum every morning and it sits perfectly under makeup. Bought my second tube already.
    Mei C.

    The Layering Method A guide to building a skincare routine that actually works.
    Routine Skin care

    Questions? We’ve Got Answers

    Back
    Skincare & Products
    Back

    How do I build a K-beauty routine if I'm just starting out?

    The layering method follows a simple principle — go from thinnest to thickest texture. A beginner routine can be just four steps: cleanser, hydrating toner, moisturizer, and SPF in the morning. From there, you can layer in essences, serums, and targeted treatments as your skin tells you what it needs.

    Back

    Are your products suitable for sensitive skin?

    Many of our formulations are designed with sensitive skin in mind — particularly our Centella, Heartleaf, and Cica-based products, which are formulated to soothe redness, calm irritation, and strengthen the skin barrier. Each product page lists its full ingredient list and skin type compatibility. If you have specific sensitivities or allergies, we always recommend patch-testing a new product on your inner forearm for 24 hours before applying to your face.

    Back

    Can I layer different products from your store together?

    Yes — that's how our products are designed to be used. Most of our formulations are created to layer harmoniously, allowing you to customize your routine to your skin's needs. The general layering order is: cleanser → toner → essence → serum/ampoule → eye cream → moisturizer → SPF (AM) or sleeping mask (PM). For best results, wait 30-60 seconds between each layer to let it absorb. If you're combining strong actives like Vitamin C, retinol, or AHA/BHA, we recommend alternating between morning and evening rather than layering them all at once.

    Back
    Shipping & Returns
    Back

    Where do you ship and how long does delivery take?

    We ship across Canada and the United States, with orders typically processed within 1-2 business days. Standard shipping to Canadian addresses takes 3-7 business days, and US orders arrive in 5-10 business days. Free standard shipping is included on orders over $50. Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number by email so you can follow your package every step of the way.

    Back

    What is your return policy?

    We accept returns on unopened, unused products within 30 days of delivery. For hygiene reasons, opened skincare products cannot be returned unless they arrived damaged or defective. If your order arrives damaged in transit, please contact us within 7 days with photos and we'll send a replacement at no cost.

    Back

    Do you offer international shipping outside North America?

    At this time, we ship exclusively within Canada and the United States to ensure the freshest possible products reach our customers.

    Back
    About K-me
    Back

    What makes K-me different from other skincare retailers?

    K-me is a curated skincare destination — every brand and product in our shop is hand-selected for formulation quality, ingredient transparency, and the way it fits into a layerable, considered routine. We work directly with our partner brands and labs in Seoul, so what arrives at your door is authentic, fresh, and exactly as the formulators intended. We don't carry everything — we carry what we'd use ourselves.

    Back

    Are your products authentic and sourced directly from your partner brands?

    Yes — all of our products are 100% authentic, formulated in Seoul, and sourced directly from our partner brands and labs. We never source from third-party resellers or gray-market suppliers, which means you'll never receive expired, counterfeit, or repackaged products. Every order is carefully inspected before shipping.

    Back

    Are your products cruelty-free and vegan?

    Most of our products are cruelty-free, and many are also vegan — we indicate both on individual product pages so you can shop with full transparency. As a brand, we're committed to expanding our vegan and clean-formulation offerings over time, and we work with partner brands that share our values around ingredient ethics and responsible sourcing.
